name: live-voice-smoke
description: Smoke pipeline for the live voice intent. Verifies the local voice and meeting runtime surfaces are present and returns a concise mapping summary.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type without roles.

context.goal_or_target: run a governed live voice conversation smoke check

params.cmd: test -f dist/libs/actuators/voice-actuator/src/index.js && test -f dist/libs/actuators/meeting-actuator/src/index.js && command -v say >/dev/null && echo '[live-voice-smoke] runtime ready'

params.message: [live-voice-smoke] live-voice intent mapped to voice-actuator + meeting-actuator smoke path
